# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- When fixing mappings/types, only use actually existing domain values in the app data and avoid introducing nonexistent labels.

## UI Guidelines
- When updating DetailWindow section button visuals, ensure icon glyphs match each detail page top-bar icon exactly.
- Ensure titlebar button height matches system caption button height.
- For dark background SVG tweaks, base the design on the light SVG and only adjust gold tones (darker-to-current gold), avoiding unrelated palette changes.
